entries.definition:
l–f–w to scrape meat off bones; to find; to avoid; to put right;
to eliminate. Of this root, only أَلْفَى ʾalfā occurs three times in the
Qur’an.

أَلْفَى ʾalfā [v. IV trans.] to find (2:170) بَلْ نَتَّبِعُ مَا أَلْفَيْنَا عَلَيْهِ آبَاءَنَا
rather, we [will] follow what we found our fathers following.
entries.definition_english:
l–f–w to scrape meat off bones; to find; to avoid; to put right;
to eliminate. Of this root, only أَلْفَى ʾalfā occurs three times in the
Qur’an.

أَلْفَى ʾalfā [v. IV trans.] to find (2:170) بَلْ نَتَّبِعُ مَا أَلْفَيْنَا عَلَيْهِ آبَاءَنَا
rather, we [will] follow what we found our fathers following.
